infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Design on a Dime needs camera access so you can take a photo of the room you want a renovation report for.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Design on a Dime needs photo library access so you can choose a room photo to analyze.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Design on a Dime can save your renovation report and photos to your library when you choose to save them.

plugins.photosPermission: Design on a Dime needs photo library access so you can choose a room photo to analyze.
plugins.cameraPermission: Design on a Dime needs camera access so you can take a photo of the room you want a renovation report for.
